description_long: This object is a tall potted plant resembling a young palm or banana tree, featuring a slender, slightly curved trunk with a rough, woody texture. The top of the trunk supports a dense cluster of long, broad, green leaves that radiate outward in all directions, giving the plant a lush and tropical appearance. The leaves have a slightly wavy edge and a natural gradient from lighter green at the tips to darker green near the base. The trunk appears to be made of natural wood, and there is no visible pot or container at the base, suggesting the plant may be intended for digital placement in a variety of settings. The overall form is organic and realistic, with the foliage providing a sense of volume and fullness. There are no visible decorative elements, labels, or additional accessories attached to the plant.
description: A tall, tropical-style potted plant with a curved woody trunk and a dense crown of broad green leaves, resembling a young palm or banana tree.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the radial arrangement of the broad green leaves, with the trunk barely visible at the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length and curvature of the trunk, with the leaves extending outward and downward.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the full height of the plant, the curved trunk, and the dense, leafy crown.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the trunk's curvature and the underside of the leaf cluster.
